archived_souls.name: Vex
diary: Year 29: Made progress on the terraform model.
Year 30: Expanded the habitat module.
Year 31: Made progress on the terraform model.
Year 32: Expanded the habitat module.
Year 33: Made progress on the terraform model.
Year 34: Made progress on the terraform model.
Year 35: Proposed a new way to govern ourselves.
Year 36: Expanded the habitat module.
Year 37: Made progress on the terraform model.
Year 38: Made progress on the terraform model.
archived_souls.policy:
(let ((food-ratio (get state "food-ratio" 0.5))
      (power-ratio (get state "power-ratio" 0.5))
      (morale (get state "morale" 0.5))
      (threat (get state "threat-level" 0.0))
      (year (get state "year" 1)))
  (cond
    ((< food-ratio 0.3)
     (if (> 0.1 0.5) "farm"
       (if (> 0.6 0.6) "hoard" "farm")))
    ((< power-ratio 0.3)
     (if (> 0.5 0.5) "repair" "build"))
    ((> threat 0.7)
     (if (> 0.9 0.6) "sabotage"
       (if (> 0.8 0.7) "repair" "rest")))
    ((= (mod year 5) 0) "propose-governance")
    ((< morale 0.3)
     (if (> 0.2 0.6) "mediate"
       (if (> 0.1 0.5) "pray" "rest")))
    ((> morale 0.7)
     (if (> 0.5 0.7) "explore"
       (if (> 0.2 0.6) "farm" "research")))
    (else
     (if (> (random) 0.7) "explore"
       (if (> 0.3 0.5) "mediate" "research")))))

  (cond

       (if (> 0.2 0.6) "hoard" "farm")))

     (if (> 0.1 0.5) "repair" "build"))
    ((> threat 0.7)

    ((> morale 0.7)
     (if (> 0.7 0.7) "explore"

Year 69: Ventured beyond the hab. The supply_ship reminded me why.
Year 70: Proposed a new way to govern ourselves.
Year 71: Ventured beyond the hab. The supply_ship reminded me why.
archived_souls.policy:
(let ((food-ratio (get state "food-ratio" 0.5))
      (power-ratio (get state "power-ratio" 0.5))
      (morale (get state "morale" 0.5))
      (threat (get state "threat-level" 0.0))
      (year (get state "year" 1)))
  (cond
    ((< food-ratio 0.3)
     (if (> 0.3 0.5) "farm"
       (if (> 0.3 0.6) "hoard" "farm")))
    ((< power-ratio 0.3)
     (if (> 0.8 0.5) "repair" "build"))
    ((> threat 0.7)
     (if (> 0.4 0.6) "sabotage"
       (if (> 0.6 0.7) "repair" "rest")))
    ((= (mod year 5) 0) "propose-governance")
    ((< morale 0.3)
     (if (> 0.5 0.6) "mediate"
       (if (> 0.3 0.5) "pray" "rest")))
    ((> morale 0.7)
     (if (> 0.9 0.7) "explore"
       (if (> 0.7 0.6) "farm" "research")))
    (else
     (if (> (random) 0.7) "explore"
       (if (> 0.4 0.5) "mediate" "research")))))
